title: More Bundles
description: A Minecraft mod that adds a compact storage bag to keep your items organized, save space, and carry your treasures with ease. 🎒📦
body:
**Minecraft Bundle Mod** 🎒✨
The smartest way to organize your inventory! This mod adds a compact storage bag to carry your small and valuable items with ease.

**🔨 How to Craft?**
All recipes are showcased in the *Gallery* tab on this mod page!

📦 **What Can You Store?**
Most items fit, but you can’t place another Bundle, Chest, Trapped Chest, Ender Chest, or Shulker Box inside. Still, you can tweak the settings to allow (or block) any item you want.

🎮 **Why Use It?**
Keep your inventory neat, explore with freedom, and unleash your creativity while managing items like never before!

📈 **When Is Next Update**
If this mod gets 500 downloads, the next update will be released.
